en.title: Lakeview Resort Development
en.description: Prime lakefront property perfect for a 5-star resort with stunning views of Lake Bishoftu.

am.title: የሀዳሪው የሪዞርት ልማት
am.description: የቢሾፉቱ ሀዳር ውስጥ ያለ የእስር የሚሆን ንብረት ለ5-ኮከብ ሪዞርት በጣም የሚልክ እይታዎች ጋር።

or.title: Harina Rizoortii Dhaabbii
or.description: Bakka harina Bishoftu addunyaa guutuuf kan 5-koqii rizoortii hojjechuu danda'u addunyaa guutuuf.

en.title: Commercial Complex
en.description: Mixed-use development in the heart of Bishoftu with retail, office, and residential spaces.

am.title: የንግድ ውስጥ ኮምፕሌክስ
am.description: በቢሾፉቱ ማእከል ውስጥ የሚገኘ የተለያዩ አገልግሎቶች ኮምፕሌክስ ከማሸጫ፣ ቢሮ እና የመኖሪያ ቦታዎች ጋር።

or.title: Kompileeksii Biyyoo Hojii
or.description: Biyyee Bishoftu keessatti hojiiwwan adda addaatiin kan maqaan, ofiifi mana jiraataa waliin.

en.title: Business Hotel Chain
en.description: Modern business hotel targeting corporate clients and conference tourism in Bishoftu.

am.title: የንግድ ሆቴል ቼይን
am.description: ዘመናዊ የንግድ ሆቴል የኩባንያ ደምዳሞችን እና የኮንፈረንስ ቱሪዝምን በቢሾፉቱ ይሲ።

or.title: Hooteelii Hojiiwwan
or.description: Hooteelii hojiiwwan ammaa kan qophii hojiiwwan fi konferenseen tuurizimii Bishoftu keessatti.

en.title: Flower Farm Estate
en.description: Large-scale flower farm with export potential and sustainable agricultural practices.

am.title: የአበባ እርሻ እምድር
am.description: ትልቅ የአበባ እርሻ የማውጣት እና የማስተላለፍ እድል ከዘለወት የእርሻ ተግባራት ጋር።

or.title: Bakka Ulaagaa Fagaatee
or.description: Fagaatee adda addaatiin kan baay'ee fayyadamuuf kan exoprtiin danda'u fi hojiiwwan qonnaa walitti qabamu.

en.title: Residential Apartments
en.description: Modern apartment complex targeting professionals and expatriates in Bishoftu.

am.title: የመኖሪያ አፓርታማዎች
am.description: ዘመናዊ የአፓርታማ ኮምፕሌክስ ለፕሮፌሽናሎች እና ለውጭ ዜጋዎች በቢሾፉቱ ይሲ።

or.title: Apaartameentiiwwan Mana Jiraataa
or.description: Kompileeksii apaartameentii ammaa kan pirofeeshinaaloonota fi aadda biyyootii Bishoftu keessatti.

en.title: Eco-Lodge Development
en.description: Sustainable eco-tourism lodge near Lake Hora with traditional Oromo architecture.

am.title: የኢኮ-ሎጅ ልማት
am.description: የሚዘልቅ የኢኮ-ቱሪዝም ሎጅ ከሆራ ሀዳር ጎን በባህላዊ ኦሮሞ አርክቴክቸር ጋር።

or.title: Eco-Lodge Dhaabbii
or.description: Eco-tuurizimii lodge Harina Hora gaggabaabii kan aadaa Oromoo arkiiteekturii waliin.
